overall.description: A truck simulator game showing first-person driving through rainy urban streets. The player navigates through moderate traffic with active windshield wipers, stops at an intersection behind a large white truck, then executes a right turn onto a less busy arterial road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban commercial street with mixed traffic

events.description: passing a blue truck driving in the opposite direction on the left
overtaking a yellow car parked on the right side of the street
slowing down as approaching intersection with traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: blue truck driving in opposite direction, passing by on the left
yellow car moving slowly or parked along the right curb

entered.detail: multi-story residential and commercial buildings with ground floor shops
urban commercial buildings with storefronts and signage
line of deciduous trees along the sidewalk, partially obscuring buildings
row of parked vehicles including red and silver cars along the curb

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rainy urban commercial district with concrete buildings lining both sides of the multi-lane street. The windshield wipers maintain visibility as the truck passes a blue truck and yellow car, with parked vehicles visible along the right curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection stopped behind large commercial truck

events.description: coming to complete stop behind large white box truck at traffic light
view becomes dominated by rear of white truck, waiting at red light
observing cross traffic passing through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: brought the truck to a complete stop behind a large white box truck, waiting at a traffic light with brake lights illuminated

notable_agents.action: large white box truck stopped directly ahead with red brake lights on, blocking view of intersection

entered.detail: large white commercial box truck with red taillights and reflective strips
circular red and white traffic sign indicating no entry on right side of intersection

segments.scene_description: The truck decelerates and stops behind a large white box truck at a traffic light. The view is dominated by the rear of the white truck while waiting, with cross traffic visible passing through the intersection and traffic signs visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: arterial road with commercial buildings and bus stop

events.description: beginning right turn maneuver at the intersection
completing turn onto new road with different building style and less density
accelerating along the new road past a bus stop shelter

agents.ego_description: executed a right turn at the intersection, accelerating along a new arterial road with lighter traffic

notable_agents.action: white box truck from previous segment turning left or proceeding straight through intersection

entered.detail: low-rise commercial buildings with large windows and signage including a bus stop
covered bus stop with glass panels and advertising display showing route information
dense green bushes and trees along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck completes a right turn onto a less dense arterial road, leaving the white truck behind. The new scene features commercial buildings on the right with a visible bus stop shelter, and increased vegetation along the left side of the wet road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a truck navigating a rainy urban commercial district that eventually transitions into a quieter arterial road. It begins by driving through a multi-lane street lined with concrete buildings, passing a blue truck and a yellow car while windshield wipers clear the rain. As the vehicle decelerates, the view shifts to focus on the rear of a large white box truck while waiting at a traffic light amidst passing cross traffic and roadside signs. The scene then opens up as the truck executes a right turn, leaving the congestion behind to enter a less dense area. Finally, the environment transforms to feature a bus stop shelter among commercial buildings on the right and increased greenery along the left side of the wet pavement.
